movie.title: Little Miss Rawther (2023) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Malayalam] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Naina Rawther, a so-called liberated and modern-day successful young woman, born to an upper-middle class Muslim family, finds herself at great odds on her wedding night. Meanwhile, AB, her college sweetheart is seen going through a very tough phase in his life. Would their love endure the night or perish at dawn break?
